arts.ttl: Fulham beat Man Utd in shootout - Watch all the penalties
arts.sum: Watch the penalty shootout as Fulham overcome Manchester United in the FA Cup fifth round at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Fulham reach quarter-finals after shootout win over Man Utd
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Bernd Leno is Fulham's hero with two saves in the penalty shootout to knock Manchester United out of the FA Cup in the fifth round.

arts.ttl: Amorim 'naive' for saying Man Utd goal is to 'win Premier League' - Rooney
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney says Ruben Amorim should focus on gradual improvement after the Red Devils boss said his goal was to "win the Premier League".

arts.ttl: Why Europa League progression is 'so important' for Man Utd & Spurs
arts.sum: Football finance expert, Professor Rob Wilson, takes a look at the effects of progression in the Europa League and lays out the situation for Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur ahead of their last-16 ties.

arts.ttl: 'He's shot' - Gary Neville's worrying admission about 'struggling' Manchester United player
arts.sum: Man United forward Rasmus Hojlund is now 18 games without a goal and Gary Neville has admitted it's "sad" to watch him struggle so badly.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Real Sociedad - Europa League
arts.sum: How Man Utd could line up for the first leg of their Europa League last 16 tie with Real Sociedad on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive points deduction threat as Man United and Man City watch on
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been banned for two Premier League matches after criticising Michael Oliver during Liverpool's 2-2 draw with Everton.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists he IS the man to turn Man United around - but says Europa League glory will not solve their problems
arts.sum: United face Real Sociedad in the last 16 of the Europa League on Thursday hoping to take a backdoor route into next season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends overlooking Man Utd star for Europa League squad amid scoring woes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim and Manchester United were allowed to change up their Europa League squad ahead of their knockout fixtures in the competition but overlooked one star

arts.ttl: 'They don't know what football is' - Real Sociedad boss makes Man United Europa League claim
arts.sum: Real Sociedad chief Imanol Alguacil believes Manchester United are firm favourites to progress from their Europa League last-16 tie.
